Bootstrap and Pebble Developer CSS files, HTML templates for documentation header and footer, and Apache License.


## Files
- **[bootstrap.css](bootstrap.css.md)**: Bootstrap v2.3.2 CSS file for styling web elements, including layout, typography, and components.
- **[footer.html](footer.html.md)**: HTML template for the footer section of documentation, including Doxygen integration.
- **[header.html](header.html.md)**: HTML template for the header section of Pebble firmware documentation with navigation and analytics.
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: Apache License Version 2.0 terms and conditions for use, reproduction, and distribution.
- **[pebble-developer.css](pebble-developer.css.md)**: CSS styles for the Pebble Developer documentation, including font, layout, and responsive design elements.
- **[stylesheet.css](stylesheet.css.md)**: CSS styles for Doxygen documentation, including typography, layout, and color schemes.
